message:
fix(checkpoint): add path traversal protection and ${WORKING_DIR} expansion for imports

Security and usability improvements to checkpoint import functionality:

Path Traversal Protection:
- Add isPathWithinDir() helper function to validate archive paths
- Prevent malicious archives from extracting files outside checkpoint dir
- Uses filepath.Rel to detect ".." escapes after path normalization
- Applied to both tar.gz and zip import paths

${WORKING_DIR} Placeholder Expansion:
- Handle portable checkpoint exports that use ${WORKING_DIR} placeholder
- When importing without explicit --target-dir, expand placeholder to cwd
- Enables checkpoints to be portable across machines without manual fixup
- Applied consistently in both importTarGz() and importZip() functions

This hardens checkpoint import against path traversal attacks that could
potentially write files outside the intended checkpoint directory, while
also improving the user experience when importing portable checkpoints
that were exported with path rewriting enabled.
